'''mosagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhapsodical|rhapsodical]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-s-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhapsodical|rhapsodical]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mosagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosagithi|mosagithi]] || [[word:mosagiji|mosagiji]] || [[word:mosagishi|mosagishi]] || [[word:mosagiki|mosagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosaguthuthu|mosaguthuthu]] || [[word:mosagujuju|mosagujuju]] || [[word:mosagushushu|mosagushushu]] || [[word:mosagukuku|mosagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosaguthu|mosaguthu]] || [[word:mosaguju|mosaguju]] || [[word:mosagushu|mosagushu]] || [[word:mosaguku|mosaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosagufthuf|mosagufthuf]] || [[word:mosagufjuf|mosagufjuf]] || [[word:mosagufshuf|mosagufshuf]] || [[word:mosagufkuf|mosagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosagethe|mosagethe]] || [[word:mosageje|mosageje]] || [[word:mosageshe|mosageshe]] || [[word:mosageke|mosageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosagothotho|mosagothotho]] || [[word:mosagojojo|mosagojojo]] || [[word:mosagoshosho|mosagoshosho]] || [[word:mosagokoko|mosagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosagotho|mosagotho]] || [[word:mosagojo|mosagojo]] || [[word:mosagosho|mosagosho]] || [[word:mosagoko|mosagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosagofthof|mosagofthof]] || [[word:mosagofjof|mosagofjof]] || [[word:mosagofshof|mosagofshof]] || [[word:mosagofkof|mosagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfthÃŸf|mosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfjÃŸf|mosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfshÃŸf|mosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfkÃŸf|mosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|mosagÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|mosagÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|mosagÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|mosagÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfthÃŸf|mosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfjÃŸf|mosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfshÃŸf|mosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfkÃŸf|mosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfthÃŸf|mosagÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfjÃŸf|mosagÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfshÃŸf|mosagÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:mosagÃŸfkÃŸf|mosagÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mosagÃḊthÃḊ|mosagÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:mosagÃḊjÃḊ|mosagÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:mosagÃḊshÃḊ|mosagÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:mosagÃḊkÃḊ|mosagÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mosagathatha|mosagathatha]] || [[word:mosagajaja|mosagajaja]] || [[word:mosagashasha|mosagashasha]] || [[word:mosagakaka|mosagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mosagatha|mosagatha]] || [[word:mosagaja|mosagaja]] || [[word:mosagasha|mosagasha]] || [[word:mosagaka|mosagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mosagafthaf|mosagafthaf]] || [[word:mosagafjaf|mosagafjaf]] || [[word:mosagafshaf|mosagafshaf]] || [[word:mosagafkaf|mosagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mosagasha|mosagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosagshÃḋasha|mosagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosagroasha|mosagroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosagmuasha|mosagmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosagyaasha|mosagyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosagnkshÃḋasha|gomosagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosagnkroasha|gomosagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosagnkmuasha|gomosagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosagnkyaasha|gomosagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mosasagasha|mosasagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosasagshÃḋasha|mosasagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosasagroasha|mosasagroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosasagmuasha|mosasagmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosasagyaasha|mosasagyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosasagnkshÃḋasha|gomosasagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosasagnkroasha|gomosasagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosasagnkmuasha|gomosasagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosasagnkyaasha|gomosasagnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mesÃḊgasha|mesÃḊgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mesÃḊgshÃḋasha|mesÃḊgshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mesÃḊgroasha|mesÃḊgroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mesÃḊgmuasha|mesÃḊgmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mesÃḊgyaasha|mesÃḊgyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomesÃḊgnkshÃḋasha|gomesÃḊgnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomesÃḊgnkroasha|gomesÃḊgnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomesÃḊgnkmuasha|gomesÃḊgnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomesÃḊgnkyaasha|gomesÃḊgnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mosfagasha|mosfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mosfagshÃḋasha|mosfagshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mosfagroasha|mosfagroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mosfagmuasha|mosfagmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mosfagyaasha|mosfagyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomosfagnkshÃḋasha|gomosfagnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomosfagnkroasha|gomosfagnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomosfagnkmuasha|gomosfagnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomosfagnkyaasha|gomosfagnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|17228b0}}
